metadata.description: Official Ella Networks plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: ella-core
plugins.description: Manage and inspect a running Ella Core 5G private mobile network via its REST API. Triggers: subscribers, profiles, slices, policies, data networks, radios, BGP, NAT, routes, PDU sessions, IMSI, S-NSSAI, DNN, 5QI, AMBR, ARP, audit logs, flow reports, data usage on an Ella Core instance.
